text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hup, hup, hup! One, two, one, two, mun, mun,
threeee!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whew! You're sure in a good mood today,
Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yup. That's because today's a special day... It's
Mun Mun Day!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mun Mun Day is the day when my parents'
restaurant gives out free sides. Things like
meatballs and fried chicken.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I used to always be so busy helping out that even
now, whenever the special day comes along, my
body gets all excited all by itself! Like mun, mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Which is all to say... I'm gonna go for seconds on
my training today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, now! Don't push yourself too hard, m'kay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ei, mun! Ei, mun! Ei, ei, muuun!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can't even see her anymore. Mun Mun Day sure
is fearsome...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser seems more focused than
usual today. She even does some extra training
after she finishes running.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm fine! Ei, mun! Ei, mun!
